purpose: Establish an independently trained, multi-seed, paper-grade IWildCam foundation before any new method development.

allowed: multi-seed characterization of the frozen PoorFrogs label-template FLYP training foundation
paired per-seed comparison of frozen post-hoc evaluation heads

terminology.drm_weight_nonzero: L2-to-initialization or L2-SP surrogate; must not be called DRM

independent_seed_protocol.independence_definition: Each seed starts from a freshly initialized open_clip_laion400m_e31 encoder and performs a complete training run.

frozen_evaluation_heads.name: label_template_flyp_wise
frozen_evaluation_heads.configuration: best validation epoch, per-seed alpha selected from the frozen grid

final_evaluation_allowed_only_after: all five independent checkpoint receipts are valid
the five-seed validation manifest is frozen
all post-hoc head configurations are hash-bound
data_firewall.ood_rerun_policy: One final evaluation per valid seed and frozen head. Rerun only for documented infrastructure failure without changing code, checkpoint, or configuration.

stage_0_implementation_gate.action: Implement and test deterministic seeding, immutable receipts, exact source and dataset provenance, unique seed checkpoint paths, and split-firewall enforcement.

pilot_gate_all_required: three runs complete without non-finite loss or gradients
identical source commit and dataset provenance
exactly one best epoch and one selected WiSE alpha per seed
stage_1_three_seed_pilot.pass_action: Run the two completion seeds without changing the frozen configuration.
stage_1_three_seed_pilot.fail_action: Repair only the implementation or infrastructure defect and rerun affected pilot seeds; do not tune the method from pilot metrics.

stage_2_five_seed_completion.interpretation: Variance is an observed property to report, not a gate to tune against.

metrics_and_statistics.primary_metric: IWildCamOOD F1-macro_all after the firewall opens
secondary_metrics: top-1 accuracy on each final split
metrics_and_statistics.paired_head_comparisons: Compute per-seed metric differences before aggregation.
metrics_and_statistics.confidence_interval: Two-sided 95% Student-t interval over five independent seed-level values; descriptive because n=5.
forbidden_statistics: treating frames as independent training replicates
selecting the best seed as the headline result
dropping a valid seed because of its metric
combining the single official DRM checkpoint with the five trained seeds

conditions: all runs use one hash-bound source commit and dataset snapshot
all configuration fields match except seed, checkpoint path, and run name
all final heads use the frozen configurations
all required receipts and manifests are present
validity_gate.pass_action: Treat the five-seed matrix as the paper-grade training foundation for later method design.
validity_gate.fail_action: Do not make multi-seed, robustness, or paper-grade claims. Repair protocol execution without changing frozen method hyperparameters.
